---
title: "RNA-seq / DESeq2 — Differential Expression and Visualization"
author: "Jonsson Laboratory"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: hide
---

```{r user-config, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
## ── USER CONFIGURATION ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#
# DDS_FILE: Path to a saved DESeqDataSet object (.RData).
#   The file should contain a variable named "dds" that has already been
#   processed with DESeq(). If you have a raw count matrix, run DESeq()
#   before saving.
#
DDS_FILE <- "data/dds_template.RData"

# COMPARISONS: Named list of contrast vectors for DESeq2::results().
#   Format: list("Label" = c("factor_column", "numerator", "denominator"))
#   The "Label" becomes the comparison name in all plots.
#
COMPARISONS <- list(
  "Group_A vs Control" = c("group", "Group_A", "Control"),
  "Group_B vs Control" = c("group", "Group_B", "Control"),
  "Group_C vs Control" = c("group", "Group_C", "Control")
)

# FDR_THRESHOLD: Significance cutoff for DEG calls.
FDR_THRESHOLD <- 0.05

# LFC_THRESHOLD: |log2FoldChange| cutoff for DEG calls.
LFC_THRESHOLD <- 1.5

# GENE_SETS: Named list of gene vectors for bubble/triangle plots.
#   Replace these with your biological pathway gene lists.
#   One bubble plot is produced per list element.
GENE_SETS <- list(
  Pathway_A = c("Gene1",  "Gene2",  "Gene3",  "Gene10", "Gene20",
                "Gene30", "Gene50"),
  Pathway_B = c("Gene5",  "Gene15", "Gene25", "Gene35", "Gene45",
                "Gene55", "Gene65"),
  Pathway_C = c("Gene3",  "Gene13", "Gene23", "Gene33", "Gene43")
)

# VOLCANO_XLIM: x-axis range for volcano plots. Adjust to your data.
VOLCANO_XLIM <- c(-10, 10)

# VOLCANO_YLIM: Per-comparison y-axis limits (-log10 scale).
#   Must have the same length as COMPARISONS, or set to a single value
#   to use for all plots (e.g., VOLCANO_YLIM <- 50).
VOLCANO_YLIM <- 50   # single value → same limit for all

# OUTPUT_DIR: Top-level folder for saved plots.
OUTPUT_DIR <- "Plots"

## ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
```

# Setup

```{r libraries, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(DESeq2)
library(SummarizedExperiment)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(tidyverse)
library(stringr)
library(viridis)
library(svglite)
library(ggpubr)
library(patchwork)
library(scales)
library(RColorBrewer)

for (sub in c("Volcano", "Bubble_Plots", "Triangle", "PCA")) {
  dir.create(file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, sub), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
}
```

# Load DESeqDataSet

```{r load-dds}
load(DDS_FILE)   # loads variable 'dds'
cat("Samples:", ncol(dds), "\n")
cat("Genes:  ", nrow(dds), "\n")
print(colData(dds))
```

# Extract DESeq2 Results

```{r deseq-results}
results_list <- lapply(names(COMPARISONS), function(label) {
  contrast <- COMPARISONS[[label]]
  res <- results(dds, contrast = contrast, alpha = FDR_THRESHOLD)
  as.data.frame(res) %>%
    rownames_to_column("Gene") %>%
    mutate(
      Comparison  = label,
      Gene        = toupper(Gene),
      significant = !is.na(padj) & padj < FDR_THRESHOLD & abs(log2FoldChange) >= LFC_THRESHOLD,
      direction   = case_when(
        significant & log2FoldChange > 0 ~ "Up",
        significant & log2FoldChange < 0 ~ "Down",
        TRUE                             ~ "NS"
      )
    )
})
names(results_list) <- names(COMPARISONS)

all_results <- bind_rows(results_list)

# Summary
all_results %>%
  group_by(Comparison, direction) %>%
  count() %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = direction, values_from = n, values_fill = 0)
```

# Volcano Plots

```{r volcano-plots, fig.width=6, fig.height=3, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Color scheme (consistent with publications)
vol_colors <- c("Up" = "#a00000", "Down" = "#2066a8", "NS" = "gray70")

ylim_vec <- if (length(VOLCANO_YLIM) == 1) rep(VOLCANO_YLIM, length(COMPARISONS)) else VOLCANO_YLIM

volcano_plots <- lapply(seq_along(results_list), function(i) {
  label <- names(results_list)[i]
  df    <- results_list[[i]]

  ggplot(df, aes(x = log2FoldChange, y = -log10(padj), color = direction)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 0.8) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(FDR_THRESHOLD),
               linetype = "dashed", color = "darkgrey", linewidth = 0.25) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-LFC_THRESHOLD, LFC_THRESHOLD),
               linetype = "dashed", color = "darkgrey", linewidth = 0.25) +
    scale_color_manual(values = vol_colors) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = VOLCANO_XLIM) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, ylim_vec[i])) +
    labs(title = label, x = "log\u2082 Fold Change", y = "-log\u2081\u2080(FDR)") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 10, base_family = "sans") +
    theme(
      plot.title   = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title   = element_text(size = 10),
      axis.text    = element_text(size = 9),
      legend.position = "none",
      panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.4)
    )
})
names(volcano_plots) <- names(results_list)

# Print individually
for (nm in names(volcano_plots)) print(volcano_plots[[nm]])

# Combined panel
vol_combined <- wrap_plots(volcano_plots, nrow = 1) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect")

ggsave(file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, "Volcano", "volcano_grid.svg"),
       plot = vol_combined,
       width = 6 * length(volcano_plots), height = 3,
       device = "svg")
print(vol_combined)
```

# PCA Plot

```{r pca-plot, fig.width=6, fig.height=3}
vst_data <- vst(dds, blind = TRUE)
pca_data <- plotPCA(vst_data, intgroup = "group", returnData = TRUE)
pct_var  <- round(100 * attr(pca_data, "percentVar"))

p_pca <- ggplot(pca_data, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = group)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  labs(
    title = "PCA — Variance-Stabilized Counts",
    x = paste0("PC1: ", pct_var[1], "% variance"),
    y = paste0("PC2: ", pct_var[2], "% variance"),
    color = "Group"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 10, base_family = "sans") +
  theme(
    plot.title   = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title   = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text    = element_text(size = 9),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 9),
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.4)
  )

ggsave(file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, "PCA", "pca_plot.svg"),
       plot = p_pca, width = 6, height = 3, device = "svg")
print(p_pca)
```

# Bubble Plots (Gene Set Visualization)

```{r bubble-fn}
make_bubble_plot <- function(pathway_name, genes, data) {
  genes_up <- toupper(genes)
  pdata <- data %>%
    filter(Gene %in% genes_up) %>%
    mutate(
      log_padj   = ifelse(!is.na(padj) & padj > 0, -log10(padj), NA_real_),
      color_group = ifelse(significant, "significant", "nonsignificant"),
      Gene        = factor(Gene, levels = rev(genes_up)),
      Comparison  = factor(Comparison, levels = names(COMPARISONS))
    )

  ggplot() +
    geom_point(
      data = filter(pdata, color_group == "nonsignificant"),
      aes(x = Comparison, y = Gene),
      size = 1.5, color = "darkgrey", alpha = 0.5
    ) +
    geom_point(
      data = filter(pdata, color_group == "significant"),
      aes(x = Comparison, y = Gene,
          size = abs(log2FoldChange), color = log_padj),
      alpha = 0.8
    ) +
    scale_size_continuous(
      name   = expression("Log"[2] * " Fold Change"),
      range  = c(2, 10), breaks = c(1.5, 3, 6, 12), limits = c(1.5, 12)
    ) +
    scale_color_viridis_c(
      option = "plasma", direction = -1, name = "-log10(FDR)",
      limits = c(0, 20), oob = squish,
      breaks = c(0, 5, 10, 15, 20), labels = c("0","5","10","15","20")
    ) +
    scale_y_discrete(position = "right") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
    theme(
      plot.title   = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, family = "sans"),
      axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 12, angle = 45, hjust = 1, face = "bold", family = "sans"),
      axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 12, face = "italic", family = "sans"),
      legend.title = element_text(size = 11, family = "sans"),
      legend.text  = element_text(size = 10, family = "sans"),
      legend.position = "left",
      panel.border    = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.6)
    ) +
    labs(title = pathway_name, x = "", y = "")
}
```

```{r bubble-plots, fig.width=8, fig.height=9, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
for (nm in names(GENE_SETS)) {
  p <- make_bubble_plot(nm, GENE_SETS[[nm]], all_results)
  print(p)
  ggsave(file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, "Bubble_Plots", paste0(nm, ".svg")),
         plot = p, device = "svg", width = 8, height = 9)
}
```

# Triangle / Directional Bubble Plots

```{r triangle-plots, fig.width=5, fig.height=8, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
make_triangle_plot <- function(pathway_name, genes, data) {
  genes_up <- toupper(genes)
  pdata <- data %>%
    filter(Gene %in% genes_up, significant) %>%
    mutate(
      log_padj   = ifelse(!is.na(padj) & padj > 0, -log10(padj), NA_real_),
      shape_code  = ifelse(log2FoldChange > 0, 24, 25),  # 24=up, 25=down
      Gene        = factor(Gene, levels = rev(genes_up)),
      Comparison  = factor(Comparison, levels = names(COMPARISONS))
    )

  ggplot(pdata, aes(x = Comparison, y = Gene,
                    fill = log_padj, shape = direction,
                    size = abs(log2FoldChange))) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.85, stroke = 0.3) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("Up" = 24, "Down" = 25), guide = "none") +
    scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "plasma", direction = -1, name = "-log10(FDR)",
                         limits = c(0, 20), oob = squish) +
    scale_size_continuous(name   = expression("|log"[2]*"FC|"),
                          range  = c(2, 8)) +
    scale_y_discrete(position = "right") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 13, base_family = "sans") +
    theme(
      plot.title   = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 12, angle = 45, hjust = 1, face = "bold"),
      axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 12, face = "italic"),
      legend.position = "left",
      panel.border    = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.6)
    ) +
    labs(title = pathway_name, x = "", y = "")
}

for (nm in names(GENE_SETS)) {
  p <- make_triangle_plot(nm, GENE_SETS[[nm]], all_results)
  print(p)
  ggsave(file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, "Triangle", paste0(nm, "_triangle.svg")),
         plot = p, device = "svg", width = 5, height = 8)
}
```

# Export DEG Tables

```{r export}
for (comp in names(results_list)) {
  safe_name <- gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9_-]", "_", comp)
  write_csv(results_list[[comp]],
            file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, paste0("DEGs_", safe_name, ".csv")))
}
message("Exported DEG tables to ", OUTPUT_DIR)
```
